source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A railroad flatcar of mass $M$ can roll without friction along a straight horizontal track as shown in Fig. 1.86. $N$ men, each of mass $m$, are initially standing on the car which is at rest. The $N$ men run to one end of the car in unison; their speed relative to the car is $V_{r}$ just before they jump off (all at the same time). Calculate the velocity of the car after the men have jumped off. (CUSPEA)
extraction_notes: image entries are PIL object string representations rather than clear file paths or URLs
caption content appears inconsistent with the question

image_dependency: 题干显式引用“Fig. 1.86”，且输入字段给出 `requires_image=true`。
上游字段同时标注 `text_dominant=false`，说明该样本被登记为非纯文本主导。
但题干中的关键物理量与条件（M、N、m、Vr、无摩擦、同时跳下）都已文字给出，图像更像示意图而非唯一信息源，因此不打到很高。
multi_step: 求解通常至少包含两步：先处理人与车的相对速度关系，再结合系统动量守恒求车速。
题干含多个对象与条件组合（车质量 M、N 个质量为 m 的人、相对车速 Vr、同时起跳），不是单步直接代入题。
答案为解析式而非选择题，通常需要建立方程后化简。
verifiability: `answer_type=short_text`，且答案是明确的符号表达式，目标输出边界清晰。
该题可用标准力学守恒关系独立推导，并检查结果量纲与极限情况，过程核验性较强。
`asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true`，且题干与答案都已登记存在。

decision_reasons: 题干、答案与主图均已登记存在，资产完整且 registry_passed=true。
综合信号较强：multi_step_score=0.68、verifiability_score=0.93，具备较好的入池价值。
虽有 image_necessity_uncertain 风险，但当前并非资产缺失，而是图像必要性判断存在不确定，不构成降为低优先级或拒绝的充分理由。

candidate_problem_record.subject: 物理
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A railroad flatcar of mass $M$ can roll without friction along a straight horizontal track as shown in Fig. 1.86. $N$ men, each of mass $m$, are initially standing on the car which is at rest. The $N$ men run to one end of the car in unison; their speed relative to the car is $V_{r}$ just before they jump off (all at the same time). Calculate the velocity of the car after the men have jumped off. (CUSPEA)
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。

extraction_notes: image entries are PIL object string representations rather than clear file paths or URLs
caption content appears inconsistent with the question
metadata.reasoning_chain: As there is no horizontal external force acting, the center of mass of the system consisting of the flatcar and $N$ men remains stationary. Taking the $x$-axis along the track, we have for the center of mass, $$x_{\mathrm{cm}} = \frac{M x_{\mathrm{car}}+N m x_{\mathrm{man}}}{M+N m},$$ $$\dot{x}_{\mathrm{cm}} = 0 = M \dot{x}_{\mathrm{car}}+N m \dot{x}_{\mathrm{man}},$$ where $\dot{x}_{\mathrm{car}} = V_{\mathrm{car}}$ and $\dot{x}_{\mathrm{man}} = V_{\mathrm{car}}-V_{r}$. Thus, $$M V_{\mathrm{car}}+N m\left(V_{\mathrm{car}}-V_{r}\right)=0,$$ giving $$V_{\mathrm{car}}=\frac{N m V_{r}}{M+N m}.$$

problem_main_record.reasoning_chain: As there is no horizontal external force acting, the center of mass of the system consisting of the flatcar and $N$ men remains stationary. Taking the $x$-axis along the track, we have for the center of mass, $$x_{\mathrm{cm}} = \frac{M x_{\mathrm{car}}+N m x_{\mathrm{man}}}{M+N m},$$ $$\dot{x}_{\mathrm{cm}} = 0 = M \dot{x}_{\mathrm{car}}+N m \dot{x}_{\mathrm{man}},$$ where $\dot{x}_{\mathrm{car}} = V_{\mathrm{car}}$ and $\dot{x}_{\mathrm{man}} = V_{\mathrm{car}}-V_{r}$. Thus, $$M V_{\mathrm{car}}+N m\left(V_{\mathrm{car}}-V_{r}\right)=0,$$ giving $$V_{\mathrm{car}}=\frac{N m V_{r}}{M+N m}.$$
